title: McCormick is cutting jobs, starting with ‘voluntary' retirement followed by ‘involuntary' layoffs

title: McCormick (MKC) Q4 Earnings & Sales Miss Estimates, Decline Y/Y

title: McCormick (MKC) Misses Q4 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: McCormick (MKC) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of -15.12% and 3.63%, respectively, for the quarter ended November 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: McCormick stock falls after it misses profit target and warns of 2023 earnings shortfall
text: McCormick & Co. Inc. MKC stock is down 3.8% in premarket trades after the company missed its fourth-quarter earnings and revenue targets and said it would miss analyst expectations for 2023 profit. The company said its fourth-quarter profit fell to $185.7 million, or 69 cents a share, from $197.4 million, or 73 cents a share, in the year-ago quarter.
